response.overview: When a couple leave Ireland for a fresh start in America, they expect opportunity. But after settling into a seemingly perfect prestigious neighborhood, the family quickly discovers the community is laced with prejudice and quiet cruelty. As their teenage child becomes the target of relentless bullying for being different, the family must confront discrimination, homophobia, and the painful question of whether the American dream was ever meant for people like them.
response.title: Aoife
